summary: ff-merged onto main after clean re-rebase; 2 fixups squashed; tests + lint green.
summary_80w: Ship leaf for kata nnv8 completed. Re-rebase was a no-op (target unchanged), pre-merge checks and worktree-isolation gate held, two fixup commits squashed into the resolve commit with an empty post-squash diff, go test ./... and golangci-lint run ./... both passed on the rebased tip, ff-merge onto main succeeded at 9f3c1d2, and the worktree plus branch were torn down cleanly. No tiebreakers fired. Parent should close the kata against the merged SHA.
